signals.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
signals.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI支持欧盟AI内容透明度实践准则，推进AI生成内容的来源标准和识别工具

signals.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
signals.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
signals.aiSummary: BBVA银行与OpenAI合作，为10万员工部署ChatGPT企业版，加速AI驱动的银行业务转型

signals.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
signals.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI收购Ona扩展Codex云环境能力，推进企业级AI代理应用

signals.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
signals.summary: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.
signals.aiSummary: Notion通过Codex实现规格自动生成和AI语音输入，显著提升小团队工程效率

signals.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
signals.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
signals.aiSummary: 针对AI时代提出以人为本的产业政策，关注机遇扩展、财富共享和制度韧性建设

signals.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
signals.summary: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI秘密向SEC提交S-1上市申请，未确定进一步行动时间

signals.title: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
signals.summary: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布AGI发展愿景，强调普惠性、安全性和共享繁荣，将影响AI技术普及路径

signals.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
signals.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT推出新记忆系统，可跨对话记住用户偏好，提升交互体验和个性化服务能力
